options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
This selects the victory condition from the following:
Entropy - Collect seven party members and beat Entropy.
Omni - Reach Omni and defeat them using any strategy.
Memory Emblem - Find and collect enough Memory Emblems.
Chaos Emblem - Defeat bosses holding Chaos Emblems.

options.name: emblemcount
options.description:
How many Memory Emblems are required to beat the game?
(Only affected if your goal is Memory Emblems)

options.name: emblempool
options.description:
How many Memory Emblems are added to the item pool?
(Only affected if your goal is Memory Emblems)

options.name: chipcount
options.description:
How many Chaos Chips are required to beat the game?
(Only affected if your goal is Chaos Chips)

Chaos Chips will only spawn on bosses dictated by your
settings.

options.name: chippool
options.description:
How many Chaos Chips are added to the item pool?
(Only affected if your goal is Chaos Chips)

options.name: easylogic
options.description:
This creates an easier path for the player which prevents logic requiring the use of the multicolored doors found
in other zones.

options.name: omniscaling
options.description: This toggles whether Omni scales the party's level down to 50 when fought.

options.name: minibosses
options.description:
This toggles whether minibosses drops are included in the multiworld.
NOTE: You may still need to defeat minibosses if they are blocking your path to progression

options.name: wardens
options.description:
This toggles whether Wardens drops are included in the multiworld.
NOTE: This only includes normal Wardens, Chaos Wardens are a different option

options.name: chaoswardens
options.description:
This toggles whether Chaos Wardens drops are included in the multiworld.
NOTE: This only includes Chaos Wardens, normal Wardens are a different option

options.name: omni
options.description:
This toggles whether Omni drops are included in the multiworld.
Note! Disabling this could prevent Omni from being beatable.

options.name: shops
options.description: This toggles whether shops are included in the multiworld.

options.name: recollections
options.description: This toggles whether ReCollections are included in the multiworld.

options.name: starstuds
options.description: This toggles whether Starstuds are included in the multiworld.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
